events.headline: 5 consecutive days of positive spot BTC ETF net inflows (~$900M week); Apr 16 intake $411M (2nd largest of month)
events.rationale: Institutional demand re-accelerating; first monthly positive ETF flow of 2026 ending 4-month outflow streak

events.headline: Strategy (MSTR) added 34,164 BTC at avg $74,395; total 815,061 BTC
events.rationale: Corporate treasury continues accumulation near current price band

events.headline: Morgan Stanley launches MSBT Bitcoin ETF — expanding institutional rails
events.rationale: New distribution channel for BTC exposure among wirehouse clients

events.headline: BlackRock IBIT holdings exceed $61B; recent $900M+ inflows
events.rationale: Concentration of institutional demand but also flow signal

events.headline: FOMC 28-29 April meeting; markets expect hold, questioning whether Fed can cut in 2026
events.rationale: Binary event risk — dovish tone = tailwind, hawkish hold = risk-off

events.headline: Core PCE revised higher to 2.7% (from 2.4%); Fed cut path tightening
events.rationale: Sticky inflation reduces liquidity tailwind; USD firm pressures risk assets

events.headline: Iran / Strait of Hormuz tension; possible renewed energy shock
events.rationale: Geopolitical risk premium + inflation channel; historically risk-off for BTC short-term

events.headline: Kelp DeFi protocol exploit causing contagion jitters
events.rationale: DeFi stress events historically precede short-term crypto-wide drawdowns

events.headline: Global regulatory convergence: Japan reclassifies crypto under FIEA; HK grants stablecoin licenses to HSBC & Anchorpoint; US GENIUS Act stablecoin framework advancing
events.rationale: Reduced regulatory risk premium across major jurisdictions

events.headline: 100+ crypto firms petition US Senate to move market structure bill markup
events.rationale: Industry coordinated push; legislative clarity is medium-term positive

macro_calendar: March CPI already released; next CPI May 13
